generated_queries: site:congress.gov "children safety" OR "minor protection" AND ("draft bill" OR "enacted law") AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]
site:ftc.gov "e-commerce regulation" OR "social commerce" AND "regulatory guidance" AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]
site:justice.gov "data localization" AND ("court ruling" OR "hearing") AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]

signals.title: Social Security Child Protection Act of 2025
signals.summary: This act mandates the Social Security Administration to issue a new Social Security number to children under 14 if their original card is lost or stolen during mailing, enhancing identity protection for minors.
key_provisions: Mandates issuance of new Social Security number for children under 14 if lost or stolen.
Requires evidence under penalty of perjury to obtain a new number.

signals.title: Child Marriage Prevention Act of 2024
signals.summary: This act aims to combat child marriage in the United States by establishing federal standards and supporting state efforts to prevent child marriages.
key_provisions: Establishes federal standards to prevent child marriages.
Supports state efforts to combat child marriage.

signals.title: Child Safety and Well-Being Act of 2024
signals.summary: This act proposes the establishment of an independent Children’s Commission and the position of Children’s Commissioner to oversee and promote policies related to child safety and well-being.
key_provisions: Establishes an independent Children’s Commission.
Creates the position of Children’s Commissioner.

signals.title: Amendment to the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act
signals.summary: This amendment seeks to enhance online safety for minors by updating the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act of 1998.
key_provisions: Enhances online safety for minors.
Amends the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act of 1998.

signals.title: PROTECT Kids Act
signals.summary: This act requires schools to obtain parental consent before changing a minor child's gender markers, pronouns, or preferred name on school forms.
key_provisions: Requires parental consent for changes to gender markers and pronouns.
Mandates parental consent for changes to sex-based accommodations.

signals.title: INFORM Consumers Act
signals.summary: The act requires online marketplaces to collect, verify, and disclose specific information about high-volume third-party sellers to enhance transparency and accountability.
key_provisions: Requires online marketplaces to verify third-party sellers.
Enhances transparency in online transactions.

signals.title: FTC's Updated Endorsement Guides
signals.summary: The updated guides clarify requirements for disclosing material connections between advertisers and endorsers, addressing the use of endorsements in social media and influencer marketing.
key_provisions: Clarifies disclosure requirements for endorsements.
Addresses endorsements in social media and influencer marketing.

signals.title: FTC's Rule on Unfair or Deceptive Fees
signals.summary: This rule prohibits bait-and-switch pricing and other tactics used to obscure and misrepresent total prices and fees in live-event ticketing and short-term lodging sectors.
key_provisions: Prohibits bait-and-switch pricing.
Applies to live-event tickets and short-term lodging.

signals.title: Protecting Children from Chemical and Surgical Mutilation
signals.summary: This executive order prohibits federal funding for medical interventions aimed at changing a child's sex and directs HHS to review and rescind related policies.
key_provisions: Prohibits federal funding for sex-change interventions for minors.
Directs HHS to review related policies.

signals.title: Reinstating Common Sense School Discipline Policies
signals.summary: This executive order rescinds previous guidance on school discipline and directs the Department of Education to issue new guidance emphasizing compliance with Title VI protections.
key_provisions: Rescinds previous guidance on school discipline.
Emphasizes compliance with Title VI protections.
